concerns.text: FR-001 states 'varied baseline complexity scores' but does not define what constitutes 'varied' (e.g., minimum range, standard deviation, or quantile spread). Verifiable but needs measurable threshold for testability.

FR-002 states 'adding multiple minor objects' without defining 'multiple' (e.g., minimum count of 3-5 as referenced in US-1). The acceptance scenario in US-1 clarifies this, but FR-002 should be self-contained for verifiability.
